---
title: "Languages of New York City"
description: "~700 language varieties from all over the world used in NYC — about 10% of world languages."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-11-27"
categories: [linguistics, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Languages of New York City Map. Image: languagemap.nyc. ([Source](https://languagemap.nyc/))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

"At least ~700 language varieties from all over the world are used in the New York area."

That's ~10% of world languages!

Languages of New York City <https://languagemap.nyc/>

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_languages-of-new-york-city-map-activity-7267590259238940673-IPgn).*
